reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the reopenable packet claim satisfied for the selected checked-in eval artifacts; do not infer retention or proof quality for every future consumer eval run.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet reopenability and metadata that can be protected by deterministic spec checks and packet/file evidence.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by spec lint, selected eval-surface evidence, and present eval-summary/eval-observed packets for the recorded self-dogfood runs.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep summary and observed packet schema checks in the evaluation spec whenever new eval surfaces are promoted as user-facing evidence.
